subcodes.title: Words spoken at Baltimore Hotel in Paris, 1913-05-11
subcodes.first_line: Bahá'u'lláh in one of his Tablets says: "Therefore I will explain for your benefit certain luminous and shining mysteries, whereby you will become so attracted
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision
